hostPort.title: Host and Port
hostPort.description: Host and port of the SAP HANA instance underlying BW/4HANA, e.g. hana-host:30015.

username.title: Username
username.description: HANA database username with access to BW metadata tables.

password.title: Password
password.description: Password for the HANA database user.

abapSchema.title: ABAP Schema
abapSchema.description: Schema name in HANA where BW/4HANA ABAP metadata tables reside (e.g. SAPHANADB). Check your system with: SELECT SCHEMA_NAME FROM SYS.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'RSOADSO'.

schemaFilterPattern.title: Default Schema Filter Pattern
schemaFilterPattern.description: Regex to only include/exclude InfoAreas that match the pattern.

tableFilterPattern.title: Default Table Filter Pattern
tableFilterPattern.description: Regex to only include/exclude InfoProviders (ADSOs, CompositeProviders) that match the pattern.
